mapper.select: SELECT customer_id as "id", customer_id as "userId", first_name as "firstName", last_name as "lastName", email as "email", phone as "phone", customer_status as "stateId", customer_tier as "customerTier", segment as "segment", registered_date as "registeredDate", last_login_at as "lastLoginAt", last_active_at as "lastActiveAt", email_verified as "emailVerified", phone_verified as "phoneVerified", city as "city", state as "state", pincode as "pincode", total_orders as "totalOrders", total_spent as "totalSpent", avg_order_value as "avgOrderValue", first_order_date as "firstOrderDate", last_purchase_date as "lastPurchaseDate", ltv as "ltv", total_returns as "totalReturns", return_rate as "returnRate", reviews_given as "reviewsGiven", churn_risk as "churnRisk", days_since_last_purchase as "daysSinceLastPurchase", fraud_score as "fraudScore", open_tickets as "openTickets", wishlist_count as "wishlistCount", active_cart_value as "activeCartValue" FROM hm_query.customer_360_flat WHERE customer_id = #{userId}
SELECT customer_status as "stateId", count(*) as "userCount" FROM hm_query.dim_customer GROUP BY customer_status
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.dim_customer WHERE customer_status = 'REGISTERED'

SELECT customer_key as "id", customer_key as "userId", first_name as "firstName", last_name as "lastName", email as "email", customer_tier as "customerTier", customer_status as "stateId", registered_date as "registeredDate" FROM hm_query.dim_customer WHERE customer_status = 'REGISTERED' ORDER BY registered_date DESC ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.dim_customer WHERE customer_status = 'SUSPENDED'

SELECT customer_key as "id", customer_key as "userId", first_name as "firstName", last_name as "lastName", email as "email", customer_tier as "customerTier", customer_status as "stateId" FROM hm_query.dim_customer WHERE customer_status = 'SUSPENDED' ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT customer_key as "id", customer_key as "userId", first_name as "firstName", last_name as "lastName", email as "email", phone as "phone", customer_status as "stateId", customer_tier as "customerTier" FROM hm_query.dim_customer WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.dim_customer WHERE segment = #{role}

SELECT customer_key as "id", customer_key as "userId", first_name as "firstName", last_name as "lastName", email as "email", phone as "phone", customer_status as "stateId", customer_tier as "customerTier", segment as "segment" FROM hm_query.dim_customer WHERE segment = #{role} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.dim_customer WHERE churn_risk IN ('MEDIUM', 'HIGH')

SELECT customer_key as "id", customer_key as "userId", first_name as "firstName", last_name as "lastName", email as "email", customer_tier as "customerTier", customer_status as "stateId", churn_risk as "churnRisk", total_orders as "totalOrders", total_spent as "totalSpent", last_purchase_date as "lastPurchaseDate" FROM hm_query.dim_customer WHERE churn_risk IN ('MEDIUM', 'HIGH') ORDER BY total_spent DESC ${pagination}
